argument.script: (async () => { const html = document.documentElement.outerHTML; const posts = []; const regex = /<a[^>]*href="\/(\d{9})\.html"[^>]*><span[^>]*class="t-title"[^>]*>([^<]+)<\/span><\/a>/g; let match; while ((match = regex.exec(html)) !== null && posts.length < {{ limit }}) { posts.push({ rank: posts.length + 1, title: match[2].trim(), url: 'https://bbs.hupu.com/' + match[1] + '.html' }); } return posts; })()
